steps.title: Identify what explicitly changed
steps.content: The passage states: “he ceased to write plays and assumed instead the nobler rôle of patron.” The explicit change is that he stopped writing plays.

steps.title: Apply this to the answer choices
steps.content: Choice D directly captures this: he stopped writing plays. The other three choices either describe events the passage doesn't discuss or contradict his actual transformation. That matches choice D — D is correct.
